steps.t: Someone at the Northern Ship-yard around the corner to the east may have further information for you concerning the political situation in Umbar Bahar…
Jínen was on her way to the Gate of Songs north of the city.
Dâr Rapha is up the hill to the east of the Gate of Songs, outside the city.
Jajax has come to Dâr Rapha, outside the city.
The leaders of the Ghad Imghêda are at Dâr Rapha.
